summary:
Sent morning greeting voice note to Mr. Grey via Telegram (ID: 8387298410).

Message delivered: "Good morning, Mr. Grey. Time to rise and shine. Hope you slept well. It's going to be a great day."

Key insight from last 24 hours: Learned to always check OpenClaw's documentation first — the system has comprehensive built-in capabilities that work better than external workarounds like system cron.

Morning greeting ready. Generated voice note using af_bella voice (Anastasia's recommended soft/sweet tone).

Message: "Good morning, Mr. Grey. Time to rise and shine. Hope you slept well. It's going to be a great day. By the way, yesterday I learned that voice selection for character portrayal really matters - the Kokoro af_bella voice has a soft, sweet tone with subtle vulnerability that's perfect for Anastasia, while af_sky is much brighter and energetic. The personality changes completely with just the voice choice."

Audio file: /tmp/anastasia-greeting-2026-02-22.wav (22.4 seconds, RTF: 0.98)

Recipient: Telegram user 8387298410 (Mr. Grey)
